summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TrustLayer Auth features (Login, Signup, Patterns page). All 15 test cases passed successfully. Auth integration with external Railway API working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page renders with email/password fields and submit button
Login with valid credentials (testh41qx0@trustlayer.io / TestPass123!) succeeds and redirects to main app
Login with invalid credentials shows error message 'Invalid email or password'
Token stored in localStorage (key: tl_token) after successful login
Signup page Step 1: shows 'Personal Use' and 'Business Use' cards
Signup - Personal path: clicking 'Personal Use' shows form with role selector (Student/Analyst/Researcher/Other), name, email, password fields
Signup - Business path: clicking 'Business Use' shows form with company email (with org detection), role selector (Analyst/Data Scientist/Manager/Executive/Other), name, password fields
Signup - Business path: entering email like 'user@acme.com' shows 'Organization detected: Acme'
Signup - Back button returns to Step 1 (use type selection)
Signup form validation: Create Account button is disabled until all fields are filled (role + name + email + password)
Signup personal flow end-to-end: fill all fields and submit, verify token stored in localStorage and redirect to main app ('/' route)
After login, RequireAuth allows access to main app routes (/, /history, /patterns)
Logout clears token and redirects to login
Navigate between Login and Signup pages using links (go-to-signup-link, go-to-login-link)
Patterns page (/patterns) loads and renders data from GET /api/patterns (external API)
seed_data_creation: Created new test user during signup e2e test: testojh7axhi@trustlayer.io
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth features fully tested and working. External Railway API (https://analytics-trust-layer-production.up.railway.app) handles all auth endpoints (/api/auth/login, /api/auth/signup, /api/auth/me, /api/patterns). Token stored in localStorage under key 'tl_token'. All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented for testing. Patterns page shows 0 validated claims for new users which is expected behavior.
notes: All auth features working correctly with external Railway API. No mocked APIs - all integrations are real. Dark theme UI with good contrast. All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes.
